$comment: MERGE this into ~/.claude/settings.json — deep-merge under the existing 'hooks' key; do NOT replace the file.
Paths must be ABSOLUTE: exec-form args are passed to node with no shell, so '~' or '$HOME' would be taken literally and the hook would never load.
Replace <ABSOLUTE_HOME> below with your absolute home directory — e.g. /Users/alice (macOS) or /home/alice (Linux). Run `echo $HOME` to find it.
${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR} is also wrong here — it resolves to the CURRENT project, never ~/.claude.
Install, verify, and rollback steps: global/README.md.
